Category	Key Insights
Revenue Growth	ARR grows from $373K in Year 1 → $1.2M in Year 2 → $3.1M in Year 3. Quarterly recurring revenue rises from $39K (Q4 2025) → $1.07M (Q3 2028).
Gross Profit & Margins	Gross Profit expands from $7K (Q4 2025) to $746K (Q3 2028). Gross Margin improves from 18% → 69%, reflecting SaaS scalability.
EBITDA & Operating Leverage	EBITDA starts negative (–188% margin in Q4 2025) → turns positive in Q1 2027 → rises to 32% by Q3 2028. Demonstrates strong operating leverage.
LTV:CAC & Unit Economics	CAC falls from $17.58 (Q4 2025) → $5.61 (Q3 2028). LTV reaches ~$114.81. LTV:CAC ratio grows from 1.5x → 20x, above SaaS benchmarks (3–5x).
User Growth	Total Users: 3,000 (Q4 2025) → 61,000 (Q3 2028). Paid Users: 1,000 → 25,500. Strong free-to-paid conversion and adoption curve.
Break-even & Profitability	Break-even achieved by Q4 2026. By Q3 2028, EBITDA exceeds $342K/quarter, with ~59% EBITDA margin.
Plan Genie economics are relatively strong. It achieves scalability, good margins, and robust ARR growth, with LTV:CAC above benchmarks.
